Flat concept inventory:
- Evaluation Pipeline | papers: 1badccbe4a3cbf8662b924a97bbeea14fe2f1ac7; 54dd1600ad9e0b2d5a2899c3b7a7a403087823ae; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; 0b4a8b1c98bd13ce0a6281bb1af3761f7f887235; abf7158e68987ae7fbbefb98265821578bd9f53d; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; 5c1740e4a764fa56149bf1b706003ee7f4b054b8; b50d19c5c298f6562c3b3c6c3822a351bdc89260; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0; d6c2523ab97416c2692cbbeab082ed1790e8e55e; 6dc413b41726856169d3adf4d30043c81f54621e; 697e0add95e880bd42e00bef838181e105f91981; 22552dd0e7789f175a302055f06444a12e22b652; a9e19e8ab24071a085d1273b9f9d49aa0e4ba48c; af1f7739283bdbd2b7a94903041f6d6afd991907; 18a3ec6c7aca5fc6e21455db46b6aaff22bc1a35; 0bf85ecae19a6f64c5beea5ee7109cff5c0f4a42; 658cd67a91da86cf451e6f1b015f762b56015172; 638107136cd71057855a1d393c07923394b0e40f; a8d02ff6d075c3cc48f0b97801cc52765c8f9ac9; 2928e5a5ee488104c5d7b636f577baef2d470310; d77bc1a237b67c57b0c1b99b4802e703747a9688; 09ff7cdc583b28ec63dfc85c7142f2cb0e5e4eef; 10d3c1cfb98f4e547f579a30b31f2361297983f1; 94972e30504017156ef5b5debc419bf6edc67384; 8a9e11addba791860a9dbf15de75cc28d2cf844c; 4309d572a37d655779f9dce6a2c98c66334132de; fd755dc7b5b206c17fd953db04e1c888d45b6e4e; 185121b33189cfd5fa485418b2ebfe2491abf099
- Benchmark Construcion | papers: 1badccbe4a3cbf8662b924a97bbeea14fe2f1ac7; 54dd1600ad9e0b2d5a2899c3b7a7a403087823ae; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; 0b4a8b1c98bd13ce0a6281bb1af3761f7f887235; abf7158e68987ae7fbbefb98265821578bd9f53d; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; 5c1740e4a764fa56149bf1b706003ee7f4b054b8; b50d19c5c298f6562c3b3c6c3822a351bdc89260; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0; d6c2523ab97416c2692cbbeab082ed1790e8e55e; 6dc413b41726856169d3adf4d30043c81f54621e; 697e0add95e880bd42e00bef838181e105f91981; 22552dd0e7789f175a302055f06444a12e22b652; a9e19e8ab24071a085d1273b9f9d49aa0e4ba48c; af1f7739283bdbd2b7a94903041f6d6afd991907
- Data Collection | papers: 1badccbe4a3cbf8662b924a97bbeea14fe2f1ac7; 54dd1600ad9e0b2d5a2899c3b7a7a403087823ae; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; 0b4a8b1c98bd13ce0a6281bb1af3761f7f887235; abf7158e68987ae7fbbefb98265821578bd9f53d; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; 5c1740e4a764fa56149bf1b706003ee7f4b054b8; b50d19c5c298f6562c3b3c6c3822a351bdc89260; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0
- Annotation | papers: d6c2523ab97416c2692cbbeab082ed1790e8e55e; 6dc413b41726856169d3adf4d30043c81f54621e; 697e0add95e880bd42e00bef838181e105f91981; 22552dd0e7789f175a302055f06444a12e22b652; a9e19e8ab24071a085d1273b9f9d49aa0e4ba48c; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; 0b4a8b1c98bd13ce0a6281bb1af3761f7f887235; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; af1f7739283bdbd2b7a94903041f6d6afd991907; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0
- Evaluation Methods | papers: 18a3ec6c7aca5fc6e21455db46b6aaff22bc1a35; 0bf85ecae19a6f64c5beea5ee7109cff5c0f4a42; 658cd67a91da86cf451e6f1b015f762b56015172; 638107136cd71057855a1d393c07923394b0e40f; a8d02ff6d075c3cc48f0b97801cc52765c8f9ac9; 2928e5a5ee488104c5d7b636f577baef2d470310; d6c2523ab97416c2692cbbeab082ed1790e8e55e; d77bc1a237b67c57b0c1b99b4802e703747a9688; 09ff7cdc583b28ec63dfc85c7142f2cb0e5e4eef; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; 10d3c1cfb98f4e547f579a30b31f2361297983f1; 94972e30504017156ef5b5debc419bf6edc67384; 8a9e11addba791860a9dbf15de75cc28d2cf844c; 697e0add95e880bd42e00bef838181e105f91981; 22552dd0e7789f175a302055f06444a12e22b652; a9e19e8ab24071a085d1273b9f9d49aa0e4ba48c; 4309d572a37d655779f9dce6a2c98c66334132de; fd755dc7b5b206c17fd953db04e1c888d45b6e4e; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0; abf7158e68987ae7fbbefb98265821578bd9f53d; 185121b33189cfd5fa485418b2ebfe2491abf099
- Judge | papers: 18a3ec6c7aca5fc6e21455db46b6aaff22bc1a35; 0bf85ecae19a6f64c5beea5ee7109cff5c0f4a42; 658cd67a91da86cf451e6f1b015f762b56015172; 638107136cd71057855a1d393c07923394b0e40f; a8d02ff6d075c3cc48f0b97801cc52765c8f9ac9; 2928e5a5ee488104c5d7b636f577baef2d470310; d6c2523ab97416c2692cbbeab082ed1790e8e55e; d77bc1a237b67c57b0c1b99b4802e703747a9688; 09ff7cdc583b28ec63dfc85c7142f2cb0e5e4eef; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; 10d3c1cfb98f4e547f579a30b31f2361297983f1; 94972e30504017156ef5b5debc419bf6edc67384; 8a9e11addba791860a9dbf15de75cc28d2cf844c; 697e0add95e880bd42e00bef838181e105f91981; 22552dd0e7789f175a302055f06444a12e22b652; a9e19e8ab24071a085d1273b9f9d49aa0e4ba48c; 4309d572a37d655779f9dce6a2c98c66334132de; fd755dc7b5b206c17fd953db04e1c888d45b6e4e; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0

- Benchmark Categories | papers: 2928e5a5ee488104c5d7b636f577baef2d470310; d6c2523ab97416c2692cbbeab082ed1790e8e55e; 8a9e11addba791860a9dbf15de75cc28d2cf844c; 697e0add95e880bd42e00bef838181e105f91981; 09ff7cdc583b28ec63dfc85c7142f2cb0e5e4eef; 7e232313a59d735ef7c8a9f4cc7bc980a29deb5e; a9e19e8ab24071a085d1273b9f9d49aa0e4ba48c; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; 4309d572a37d655779f9dce6a2c98c66334132de; 154cc4e8a9e8ad24d4f9c9440b187d06b9ba57bd; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; 0bf85ecae19a6f64c5beea5ee7109cff5c0f4a42; 10d3c1cfb98f4e547f579a30b31f2361297983f1; 94773f22b5befd0e167a7de525d29bec2b09937a; a8d02ff6d075c3cc48f0b97801cc52765c8f9ac9; fd755dc7b5b206c17fd953db04e1c888d45b6e4e; 94972e30504017156ef5b5debc419bf6edc67384; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0; 54dd1600ad9e0b2d5a2899c3b7a7a403087823ae; abf7158e68987ae7fbbefb98265821578bd9f53d; 848e690a62c327e1210532d58a6b914097cac763; 1097cf8cf5961589ff693b069002e7181e24e631; af1f7739283bdbd2b7a94903041f6d6afd991907; d4b00e52fa9d60474517ed32d402448d492e0c31; b611c501269224702d1a9942c8600a31ec66ab28; bd3b3e8197d56aa8c20d18e61fae48753d618c5e; 3ebf80a0afb8db7c6f435f9683a3020451e0dd2a; b40bfcf339de3f0dba08fabb2b58b9368ff4c51a; cb6be69c67b0b15ebbda89a126f4dd62a4d32958; e18ec2c9f0b4a817b8cf0435822bbc879d7db698; d47f20de7195fea82e48315fea52ccf06dc301d3; 28f735d4f08b9cd04a46ce83fbb9ced0734f9bb3; f05126c1a792ea64a7af0c8c68b03bcddec5b297; e7cb80f37c74aa3a1cbea138cc808e8ae02bb113; e96c86407b3acf09e5d7729bec201824b717b476; 6d017adda6b2b1ea627dde2f0e85401ebb9fe566; 8946891e94831adc8cddb0d32311cce2445c96d2; bcf2c7e3f4ed64c8294c35a59220a26dd4f40060; bd05f4c741673538c829133965461047abfe96e1; a35084f393108217938c393f450dc7aff4a7ceb1; 4d5262260022d8baff65242c6eb879d184447d5f; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; b50d19c5c298f6562c3b3c6c3822a351bdc89260; 881ebd6d94065e5157f2290009b147b87eaf4ec9; 000d1d7fcc043c34a99afff72c06328034594bc7; 910b69e67f4906a1578f1598344f917fbbdc00cc; 89689059d0cdcb52d7fbb6007ab953db22936a90; 08f3a096bc3f950d09f194b8659f2862b6dc2bd9; 5b6ced36fd2423c9b16f8f87ea3374861c8d5472; be51adc913cf7681c06087aa9751caedd0054c26; 7dadcaa9242428ca12f3f9b7d38eebfb37c81da3; e83da7dec37f3f20a7508ce96ed6ccf981005ad6; fef461207f173c03231aa9a8ddf30c01bf4caca0; ea891d2c15a185a503fa15a36ee80f981148d221; e0702a22e0841c54ab865b4996d7b07af192a3e1; dd5f21a71cf9f8c9e24aa1fbdac86c2cec35d6f9; fdb3864b5c8914adedfce0245648604191e6e38e; cf336d272a30d6ad6141db67faa64deb8791cd61; a343ef4f46ccbe0ed352afe748c68d422fb032fb; ee0c9e8a935e047f2c030ecbfad93c2d80d642d7; 5c6b4d01babbf24c3474e6a10fb7154bd515b3b7; c672ec79f55cef8f7a32cd8dddfa981b893f1567; afa10cc122e312f56c6e2fa81638ab4ec1745cef; 92c141447f51b6732242376164ff961e464731c8; e65142010431ffc089b272a1174214e00693e503; 10b685acdf642c8c1534515941c5242e514ed270; ca00f4056f9039d3c1a4c3a113f5ee0527149b66; 593b42c628b49937bcd7f7c4a7d54d5f97e6b414; 4f2c1af57c056102806a184517313804f66e7447; 656a6b3c0348d69cf9f98f95cbf68046941a4f29; 4407337f4df63816e92866f0deaa842a5001a97d; 74e0f1aa5aa3bda5991e421a9d168890ac7556fa; d02b9420df66330620f8853d19de610c98d2e1c1; 057b80e235b10799d03876ad25465208a4c64caf; ea3448eb86a233189631d914721e587d45931b64; ac8089bb7944090cf1de5df25aadf5e6356f3040; b2f521c02c6ed3080c5fe123e938cdf4555e6fd2; 22552dd0e7789f175a302055f06444a12e22b652; a2645172befa9db689881b7e4a28e60f258f9418; 18940a4ccd955c72930ee0f8771ff710a9afeef3; 18a3ec6c7aca5fc6e21455db46b6aaff22bc1a35; 19e909f88b8b9b0635bd6e441094e1738c3bba9a; c7a7104df3db13737a865ede2be8146990fa4026; bb1083425517bdac8d9a6438fcf5032543acb20e; 0b395ed1c8b284e551172b728e83cf257e33729a; fca2da71f3dce2f757aef39e561a572f68106603; 658cd67a91da86cf451e6f1b015f762b56015172; 844bb298d49ef4a07b5d4929dfdfd170f6a1d5f5; 206400aba5f12f734cdd2e4ab48ef6014ea60773; 5e168847bb7e96a805893652ace4f7d42f2887c1; 4d7c68ec1a86ef5d187e7edb2f0ad63adddc8ea2; 58ee9e1c426166a5451a1ce13e1186f7d6baacfd; dcd933a032219b0bf9a420af522c68d8c34a922a; 02f41dc0b9dd7361aa90ff160952ba77fe9550cd; 8d8bc7ae829bf541e1ba56f107ad12662b5e505c; 8ecdbfe011b7189fa0ee49ffc4e42a93d728a371; 54c09be969ed2171a9c37dcaead31a774d0c5398; 754d5164e196ff231786d10a48594f3f27d8721f; 73f082fc7df9f2b9f3bf7dafb7c4422bb7aae968; d160e10dd95a8633bbd693e376a0f13d32549a77; 99bc6bbeb0b8d7057a97d361ad0cbc9669d24235; 7580327ffc9bd5daef83fe8285c0476ca074051d; fc0b46a0f3720e6c29c1a913aaa3de4a0699f713; f4793adffd6f67ffcb93ccfc5672ab301b8a2b96; df0ddb588a200d095743e9d26fc4a9318619766e; 93b6b79b4ef6c345f31722ce7c829385c6dce0d6; 18f9a6045ba01cb079c4fa49a630d71bbd27cd92; 28cbee3c16af1e0e3943f5109513aaa73c20201f; b34111fe8e230d371dd9446d52388a84b5592390; e417617c807e94dc4fb941ee7024703bf5ed0a24; 872c111c4bed5aba086cc023ce6279edb469220a; 4e3eeb47bf3bf0efef447efdd9fbb3d3539394a6; 2c3aff88d18c56c3a340ed1eec108b110b10ae01; ca50f76c6b9023ddcb75cda975779482e43cc972; 1015e77ecc84237515cccf9fc583796c38584c28; f5c8b9331e1eb3ba556dd55ecf1d143ddf8781b7; c28110e1d66ee586f611bea5c331920bdacc5d4b; 53cb57c8ca1ce950b0588d481ae399296acb8f5b; b458fc5261595f44b36325e5eaea1f874d65138f; c5db6c2726911b72d534f97bd4d1ed63f6431340; 250043fdae97d2ac87245a44923682e7a3decd50; 9686f718fc9955bfdb6f8ce3e37fe46f57bc123b; 73619a1084d7e50191cea7d0393ba2604659da31; fe351bc1bda19583a7d6b1a96a9b18f59c40b213; 0b4a8b1c98bd13ce0a6281bb1af3761f7f887235; 8d7e3e75c89660c73d635485d755fa15fc138ccd; 638107136cd71057855a1d393c07923394b0e40f; 04ceb15dfe33884ac38fa9ec0abb1e19ab090679; d77bc1a237b67c57b0c1b99b4802e703747a9688; 9dad4d7c6da4f3bb56a24742998c76a2629ac9fd; e8d513bc7554a83161f2fb26c8299b471581cdb6; 1aeb53f240f3f509bcc97ef529d9547a936f1099; 1badccbe4a3cbf8662b924a97bbeea14fe2f1ac7; 6dc413b41726856169d3adf4d30043c81f54621e; d3a1b01192f8e96097ca2fbb717d343191d62528; 920731b589af90a5b79236f4939ac117bbb939f2; 71762d71cac45f14a835f89ed048bf038be97382; 848eb8367785910c2fe31372605954ad8f9dfe6c; c1a4fb211cf995b1af1247a152fcc145594ec13b; 55d184e7bcf467f2824cd9603194e523b206f8e7; ecf2a5496c765c8a0133c45952e82e3756961a11; 9d0907770cd4619aa6a36139a859e8f09bc9f0ef; dee86cf4ddab965169297960b55a4a2c0aee58d5; de50f7e36b9013a9ffa321c156ce129309722de8; eb85c73e8bcfb66bcd5dde49e43c179e2c561ffe; 185121b33189cfd5fa485418b2ebfe2491abf099; 98de0a73fc32e04b58d76579aef964cf686b25da; ee156428803c5bd6e7372f6b27d74bcf88390db3; e14b245c2ed6d46bf2f8661fcd61b74f34d60ad7; 3c8cc9a5ee373d51e0bf71621b6eb6901c762e8f; 29d262a66c57a9f819fe0325f184b91d48a4c2a4
- Foundational Capability | papers: 2928e5a5ee488104c5d7b636f577baef2d470310; d6c2523ab97416c2692cbbeab082ed1790e8e55e; 8a9e11addba791860a9dbf15de75cc28d2cf844c; 697e0add95e880bd42e00bef838181e105f91981; 09ff7cdc583b28ec63dfc85c7142f2cb0e5e4eef; 7e232313a59d735ef7c8a9f4cc7bc980a29deb5e; a9e19e8ab24071a085d1273b9f9d49aa0e4ba48c; 0c7ca22dfbe1ce02cb0f0658292499457db8ec6e; 4309d572a37d655779f9dce6a2c98c66334132de; 154cc4e8a9e8ad24d4f9c9440b187d06b9ba57bd; b37b1dc72b1882858f5120f2cd6883134089a6ed; 0bf85ecae19a6f64c5beea5ee7109cff5c0f4a42; 10d3c1cfb98f4e547f579a30b31f2361297983f1; 94773f22b5befd0e167a7de525d29bec2b09937a; a8d02ff6d075c3cc48f0b97801cc52765c8f9ac9; fd755dc7b5b206c17fd953db04e1c888d45b6e4e; 94972e30504017156ef5b5debc419bf6edc67384; 9a2c37ab4e38652f0d50dc9818e06d35e646e2b0; 54dd1600ad9e0b2d5a2899c3b7a7a403087823ae; abf7158e68987ae7fbbefb98265821578bd9f53d; 848e690a62c327e1210532d58a6b914097cac763; 1097cf8cf5961589ff693b069002e7181e24e631; af1f7739283bdbd2b7a94903041f6d6afd991907; d4b00e52fa9d60474517ed32d402448d492e0c31; b611c501269224702d1a9942c8600a31ec66ab28; bd3b3e8197d56aa8c20d18e61fae48753d618c5e; 3ebf80a0afb8db7c6f435f9683a3020451e0dd2a; b40bfcf339de3f0dba08fabb2b58b9368ff4c51a; cb6be69c67b0b15ebbda89a126f4dd62a4d32958; e18ec2c9f0b4a817b8cf0435822bbc879d7db698; d47f20de7195fea82e48315fea52ccf06dc301d3; 28f735d4f08b9cd04a46ce83fbb9ced0734f9bb3; f05126c1a792ea64a7af0c8c68b03bcddec5b297; e7cb80f37c74aa3a1cbea138cc808e8ae02bb113; e96c86407b3acf09e5d7729bec201824b717b476; 6d017adda6b2b1ea627dde2f0e85401ebb9fe566; 8946891e94831adc8cddb0d32311cce2445c96d2; bcf2c7e3f4ed64c8294c35a59220a26dd4f40060; bd05f4c741673538c829133965461047abfe96e1; a35084f393108217938c393f450dc7aff4a7ceb1; 4d5262260022d8baff65242c6eb879d184447d5f; d3135733aa39dec20ce72aa138589dda27c8406d; b50d19c5c298f6562c3b3c6c3822a351bdc89260; 881ebd6d94065e5157f2290009b147b87eaf4ec9; 000d1d7fcc043c34a99afff72c06328034594bc7; 910b69e67f4906a1578f1598344f917fbbdc00cc; 89689059d0cdcb52d7fbb6007ab953db22936a90; 08f3a096bc3f950d09f194b8659f2862b6dc2bd9; 5b6ced36fd2423c9b16f8f87ea3374861c8d5472; be51adc913cf7681c06087aa9751caedd0054c26; 7dadcaa9242428ca12f3f9b7d38eebfb37c81da3; e83da7dec37f3f20a7508ce96ed6ccf981005ad6; fef461207f173c03231aa9a8ddf30c01bf4caca0; ea891d2c15a185a503fa15a36ee80f981148d221; e0702a22e0841c54ab865b4996d7b07af192a3e1; dd5f21a71cf9f8c9e24aa1fbdac86c2cec35d6f9; fdb3864b5c8914adedfce0245648604191e6e38e; cf336d272a30d6ad6141db67faa64deb8791cd61; a343ef4f46ccbe0ed352afe748c68d422fb032fb; ee0c9e8a935e047f2c030ecbfad93c2d80d642d7; 5c6b4d01babbf24c3474e6a10fb7154bd515b3b7; c672ec79f55cef8f7a32cd8dddfa981b893f1567; afa10cc122e312f56c6e2fa81638ab4ec1745cef; 92c141447f51b6732242376164ff961e464731c8;
